title: Interlaken, Bern — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Interlaken, Bern: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Interlaken is a city in Bern with a population of 6,000. Switzerland’s adventure capital nestled between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, with views of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau peaks, and gateway to the Jungfraujoch.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
